text: Hello. Can you hear me? What do you want? I'm Ethan from Nova Healthcare, Georgia. The reason I'm reaching out to you is to let you know about a cashback benefit to help out-of-pocket costs of up to $10,000, especially when you're in a hospital. And make sure you qualify for this. Please confirm with a yes or no if you are under the age of 65. Since I'm only using a call list in Nova, this call has discussed the company's $1,000, under this number as well as the other city. Thank you.
